name: Claude Opus 4
tagline: First Claude 4-generation flagship, launched alongside Sonnet 4 with hybrid reasoning and extended thinking.
metaDescription: Claude Opus 4 (Anthropic), released 2025-05-22 — part of the Claude Opus line. First Claude 4-generation flagship, launched alongside Sonnet 4 with hybrid reas…
overview: Claude Opus 4 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude Opus line. Released 2025-05-22. Anthropic's flagship Claude tier — most capable Opus-class model for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agentic work.
What's notable in this version: First Claude 4-generation flagship, launched alongside Sonnet 4 with hybrid reasoning and extended thinking.
